name: Pineapple-Papaya Salsa
recipeInstructions:
1. Blanch tomatoes in boiling water for 2-3 seconds.
2. Transfer to cold water using a slotted spoon and drain.
3. Peel the skin off the tomatoes with a small sharp knife.
4. Seed and dice the tomatoes.
5. Add all remaining ingredients to a large bowl.
6. Toss gently.
7. Let the salsa stand for 3 hours before serving.
(Too Busy To Cook, 1991) Happy Cooking From Ed & Company
